description: Feline humanoids driven by insatiable curiosity, trading stories and secrets across every land.
subraces: Powerful, stocky hunters stalking jungle undergrowth and striking from ambush.
Lithe climbers equally at home in treetops and city rooftops, favoring stealth over force.
Maned pride-leaders organizing communal hunts and defending territory with fierce loyalty.
Solitary, stripe-marked stalkers renowned for patience and devastating pounces.
Tufted-eared trackers adapted to cold forests and snow-covered mountain passes.
Impossibly fast sprinters serving as couriers and scouts across open plains.
Small, unassuming urbanites thriving in cities as merchants, spies, and street performers.
Midnight-black prowlers moving in perfect darkness, favoring nocturnal operations.
